description:
## Problem

Running `nix develop . --command ameba src/` reports **112 failures**
across **10+ source files**. The findings are dominated by:

- `Lint/Formatting` / `Layout/TrailingWhitespace` /
  `Layout/TrailingBlankLines` — auto-correctable by the formatter
- `Lint/UselessAssign` — small code cleanups
- `Lint/Syntax` / `Lint/UselessAssign` / `Lint/UnusedVariable` — local
  cleanups per file

This is pre-existing technical debt, not introduced by the refresh_loop
refactor. Each affected file should be cleaned independently so the
diffs are reviewable.

## Scope

Affected files (from `ameba src/`):

```
src/config/loader.cr
src/controllers/proxy_controller.cr
src/examples/state_store_actor.cr
src/favicon_storage.cr
src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr          # handled by quickhea-3ds.10
src/infrastructure/actor.cr
src/models.cr
src/rate_limiter.cr
src/repositories/feed_repository.cr
src/services/cleanup_coordinator_actor.cr
... (~10 more)
```

## Strategy

Open **one ticket per file** under this parent epic. For each file:

1. Run `crystal tool format <file>` to auto-fix formatting / whitespace
2. Manually fix any non-correctable findings (UselessAssign, etc.)
3. Verify: `ameba <file>` returns 0; `crystal spec` still passes
4. Commit + close

The parent epic itself has no code changes; it tracks the rollout.

## Acceptance

- `nix develop . --command ameba src/` returns 0 findings.
- `just nix-build` passes; existing Crystal specs pass.
- Each file landed as a separate commit with a clear, reviewable diff.
title: Epic: project-wide ameba cleanup (112 findings across ~10 files)
